allow: Bash(AWS_PROFILE=prod aws cloudformation list-stacks --region us-west-2 --stack-status-filter CREATE_COMPLETE UPDATE_COMPLETE UPDATE_ROLLBACK_COMPLETE --query "StackSummaries[].StackName" --output table)
Bash(AWS_PROFILE=prod aws appsync list-graphql-apis --region us-west-2 --query "graphqlApis[].{name:name,id:apiId,uris:uris}" --output json)
